title: polystichum capillipes
intro: Polystichum capillipes, also known as Japanese lady fern, is a species of fern that is native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Polystichum capillipes are attributed to its high content of folic acid, vitamins, and minerals, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and act as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Polystichum capillipes can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
